description_long: This is a boxy, modern SUV with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design reminiscent of luxury off-road vehicles. The front features a wide grille with horizontal slats and circular headlights, while the rear includes a spare tire mounted on the back door and slim, horizontal taillights. The side profile reveals four large doors with flush handles, tinted windows, and prominent wheel arches housing large, multi-spoke black alloy wheels. The roof is flat and slightly raised, providing ample headroom and a utilitarian silhouette. Subtle details such as side mirrors, a rear wiper, and minimal chrome accents contribute to its upscale yet rugged appearance. The overall impression is of a high-end, urban-capable SUV designed for both city streets and off-road adventures.
description: A matte black, boxy luxury SUV with four doors, large black alloy wheels, and a spare tire mounted on the rear. It features tinted windows, a wide grille, and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille, circular headlights, and a flat hood with side mirrors visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights four doors, tinted windows, large black wheels, and the spare tire protruding at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire mounted on the back door, slim horizontal taillights, and a flat rear surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing four doors, tinted windows, and large black wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke black alloy wheels with a star-shaped pattern
